experiences.description: Leading AI platform development and microservice architecture
achievements: Engineered microservice-based full-stack systems using React, Node.js, and AWS Lambda, achieving 97.9% uptime and p95 latency <250ms
Developed secure REST and GraphQL APIs with Express.js and MongoDB, cutting data retrieval time by 40%
Innovated real-time ML inference pipelines via TensorFlow.js and Redis caching, improving throughput by 52%
Deployed containerized microservices using Docker and Kubernetes, enabling zero-downtime rollouts

experiences.description: Full-stack development and ML integration for enterprise applications
achievements: Delivered 8+ production-grade web applications with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, serving 100K+ users
Streamlined CI/CD with Jenkins, Docker, and Terraform, reducing release cycles from 3 days to 6 hours
Enhanced database performance using Redis caching and PostgreSQL partitioning, sustaining 99.95% uptime
Integrated ML-driven personalization features with Next.js and TypeScript, increasing user engagement by 35%
Directed 5-member cross-functional team, improving velocity by 25% and reducing post-deploy defects by 30%
Assisted in building React + Node.js micro-features on AWS, improving UX for 10+ product modules
Supported API development using Express.js and MongoDB, writing Jest-based tests with 85% coverage
